error_signature: The connection to the server was closed unexpectedly
title: Unexpected connection closure with Google Firestore
symptom: When executing a workflow with the Google Firestore node, n8n reports that the connection to the server was closed unexpectedly. This may lead to failed requests.
root_cause: The connection to the Google Firestore server may be unstable or the server may be offline. This can happen due to network issues or misconfigured settings in the Cloud Run environment.
fix_steps: Check the network connectivity to the Google Firestore service
Verify the configuration settings for the Firestore node
Retry the request or adjust the timeout settings if necessary
agent_instruction: Investigate the network connection and Firestore node settings to resolve the connection issue.
